channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Missing directional arrow at junction, 22nd June
item.description:
Directional arrow at traffc lights onto Hyde lane was reported by myself as being knocked over. The report was marked fixed, however the directional arrow appears to have been removed rather than repaired/replaced. My concern was the safety implication of drivers receiving incorrect or unclear guidance at the junction. Please could this be reviewed?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hyde Lane, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Complete bollard is damaged (Non illuminating bollard or post)

item.title: Loose rattling man hole cover, 22nd June
item.description:
I am disappointed that this has been closed as no further action after inspection. The issue is not simply noise; the manhole cover is loose/unstable and moves when vehicles drive over it. Given the location on a bypass with higher vehicle speeds, I am concerned this could develop into a safety issue. Please could you confirm what inspection criteria were used and whether the cover was physically tested for movement under load?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree removed leaving large stump, 22nd June
item.description:
Stump is outside 5 Vittoria Walk, we would like to know if Highways plan to plant a replacement tree. If so we may be able to help water it in the early stages.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vittoria Walk, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smashed Window, 22nd June
item.description:
Smashed Bus stop window at Berkeley House heading towards Coronation Square

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Princess Elizabeth Way, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 22nd June
item.description:
End of close no lighting as it’s faulty , H&S issue as it’s the only light
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gardiners Close, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bridle path overgrown, 22nd June
item.description:
The bridle path in question is next door to Green Farm. ///campsites.pausing.permit It is extremely overgrown with nettles and large stinging weeds. The bridle path has not been cut down this year.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 22nd June

item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 22nd June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 22nd June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please cut back overgrown hedge and brambles and vegetation and tree branches growing out into footway approx 50 meters x2 meters temporary footway closure (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 22nd June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please cut back overgrown hedge and brambles and vegetation and tree branches growing out into footway approx 551 meters x2 meters temporary footway closure (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3x areas of broken pavement- look like previous repairs have failed, 22nd June
item.description:
Outside drive of no 11, outside of grasses area of number 10 and outside number 9, just before the drop kerb. All on the kerb line, in line with kerb stones, they all have loose stone in them. Also dinner plate size area in line with tree at number 10, loose stone in, caused Amazon driver to trip over. All pavements at the bottom of cul de sac are in poor condition and could do with extensive work. I am delivering leaflets and I have slipped and lost my balance, I regularly deliver leaflets here and these pavements are appalling and getting worse.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cousley Close, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
